SEARCH
Package com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller

Class FilmHandler

java.lang.Object
com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller.FilmHandler
public class FilmHandler extends Object
The FilmHandler class acts as a controller in an MVC architecture, handling interactions between the FilmsView (UI) and FilmDAO (data access) classes. It listens to user actions, queries the database through the FilmDAO, and updates the FilmsView with results.
Author:
Atle, MartinN

  • Constructor Details

    • FilmHandler

      public FilmHandler(FilmDAO model, FilmsView view)
      Constructs a FilmHandler object and sets up listeners for user actions in the FilmsView.
      Parameters:
      model - The FilmDAO instance for interacting with the film database
      view - The FilmsView instance representing the UI

  • Method Details

    • addFilmsToMyList

      private void addFilmsToMyList(List<Film> selectedFilms) throws IOException
      Adds the given list of films to the mylist file (mylist.csv). If the file does not exist, it will be created. Each film's details are written as a new line in CSV format: ,<genre>,<release year>,<rating>.</div> <dl class="notes"> <dt>Parameters:</dt> <dd><code>selectedFilms</code> - The list of films to add to the mylist, the return from a method in FilmsView</dd> <dt>Throws:</dt> <dd><code><a href="https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html" title="class or interface in java.io" class="external-link">IOException</a></code> - If an I/O error occurs while writing to the file</dd> </dl> </div> </section> </li> </ul> </section> </li> </ul> </section> <!-- ========= END OF CLASS DATA ========= --> </main> </body> </html>
